name: neufin-behavioral-signals
description: Example MCP manifest for NeuFin's behavioral intelligence tools. Private beta — this is a documentation example, not a live, publicly reachable endpoint. All tools are read-only and produce advisor-review-only output; none of them execute trades, mutate portfolios, send client communications, or make suitability determinations.

tools.name: get_client_behavioral_risk
tools.description: Read-only. Returns a behavioral risk score for a single client. Advisor-review-only — does not authorize any automated action.

tools.name: list_book_behavioral_alerts
tools.description: Read-only. Returns a ranked list of at-risk clients across an advisor's book. Advisor-review-only — does not authorize any automated action.

tools.name: get_churn_probability_score
tools.description: Read-only. Returns the Churn Probability Score (0-100) for a client with top contributing reasons. Advisor-review-only — does not authorize any automated action.

tools.name: detect_suitability_drift
tools.description: Read-only. Returns the divergence between a client's observed behavior and their stated risk profile. Advisor-review-only — does not authorize any automated action.

tools.name: generate_advisor_brief
tools.description: Read-only. Returns a generated morning brief summarizing behavioral signals for an advisor's book. Advisor-review-only — does not authorize any automated action.
